# Widget Theory

A theoretical framework for understanding component interactions in complex systems.
Originally proposed by [[Alice Smith]] and refined through collaboration with [[Bob Jones]].

## Key Properties
- Composable: widgets can be nested arbitrarily
- Observable: state changes propagate predictably
- Related to [[Gadget Pattern]] as a practical application

## Applications
See [[Acme Project]] for a production implementation.
